{{Expand}}

{{Infobox sacred-art
| name = Forged snowfoxes
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Forged snowfoxes]] are five-tailed white foxes that serve as tops for the four polished wooden columns outside the [[arena]]; they are almost exact copies of [[Elder Whisper]] and are indistinguishable from [[life]] to every sense except touch.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c7">''Unsouled'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Sacred Arts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
